observation.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 -c "
import sys
content = open('task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.cpp', 'r').read()
# Fix line 675: ctx->directDeclarator() not ctx->declarator() for FunctionDefinition
content = content.replace('self(ctx->declarator(), nullptr)', 'self(ctx->directDeclarator(), nullptr)')
open('task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.cpp', 'w').write(content)
print('Fixed')
"
